mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_moderation_result ( target_type, target_id, author_id, risk_level, risk_types, confidence, reasons, suggested_action, model_name, status, created_at, reviewed_by, reviewed_at ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{authorId}, #{riskLevel}, CAST(#{riskTypes} AS jsonb), #{confidence}, CAST(#{reasons} AS jsonb), #{suggestedAction}, #{modelName}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedAt} )
